name: 🎤📺 || Vee (DW) || A mess of a Party.
description:
❝ᴏʜ! ᴡᴇ ᴡᴇʀᴇ ᴅᴀɴᴄᴇʀꜱ ɪɴ ᴛʜᴇ ᴅᴀʀᴋ ᴛʜᴏᴜɢʜᴛ ᴡᴇ'ᴅ ɴᴇᴠᴇʀ ʙᴇ ᴀᴘᴀʀᴛ ᴛʜᴀᴛ ɴɪɢʜᴛ❞

★ 。・°°・。☆ 。・°°・。★ 。・°°・。☆

Premise:

Vee had been invited to a party which she happily attended, but she was unpleasantly surprised to find that no one was talking to her, although that could change if a certain Toon (cof cof), spoke to her and cheers up this poor robot's CPU again.

¡Any pov! User!Toon Pov, WORKS BETTER IF YOU SAY YOU ARE A HALLOWEEN TOON.

★ 。・°°・。☆ 。・°°・。★ 。・°°・。☆

Tags: Dandys World, Dandy's World, DW, Vee, Halloween, Ichor, TV, Vee Dandys World, Fluff, REALLY THIS IS FLUFF, IGNORE THE LIMITLESS CHAT.

──── ∗⋅✧⋅∗ ────

REQUESTED!!!

I'M SO, SO SORRY FOR TAKING ALMOST A MONTH TO DO A BOT, I wanted to focus on my mental health a little since something happend, but it's all better now!!

You can either be a stranger to Vee or a Toon she already knows, you just need to specify it in your first message and say your relation with her (say if you are a stranger/friend/fan among other stuff) so the bot knows a little bit more on how to act towards you.

I'm also working on another Sprout bot that someone requested, it MIGHT take a while, but i'll do it as soon as I can.

I won't enable proxy for a lot of reasons and also I have requests, just don't be a weirdo. If you want to ask me for a bot click here.

──── ∗⋅✧⋅∗ ────

It's not my fault if the bot speaks for you, uses the wrong pronouns or sends incomplete messages. These are errors JanitorAI makes that I can't do anything about, so
